# Landing Copy

## Hero Headline

Stop overpaying for AI tools.

## Subheadline

Audit Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, API, and Windsurf spend in under 90 seconds.

## Primary CTA

Run free audit

## Social Proof

Mocked: "Found ₹98,000/mo in avoidable AI spend before our next board meeting." — Seed-stage CTO

## FAQ

**Do I need to connect billing?**  
No. The MVP uses self-reported spend so founders can get an answer without OAuth or invoice access.

**Is the audit generated by AI?**  
The prose summary is AI-generated, but the savings math is deterministic and sourced to public pricing.

**Will you recommend switching tools just to show savings?**  
No. If spend is already efficient, the result says so.

**What does Credex do?**  
Credex helps teams buy discounted AI infrastructure credits sourced from companies that overforecast or pivoted.

**What gets shared publicly?**  
Only anonymized tools, plans, and savings numbers. Email and company fields are stripped from public report URLs.
